inputs.label: Tank Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of water in the aquarium, determining thermal mass

inputs.label: Target Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Desired water temperature for aquatic species

inputs.label: Room Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Surrounding ambient temperature affecting heat loss

inputs.label: Heating Time
inputs.businessContext: Time allowed for initial heating or temperature recovery

inputs.label: System Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall efficiency accounting for heat loss through glass and evaporation

inputs.label: Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Additional capacity to ensure stable temperature under varying conditions
